sections.heading: Surveillance
sections.content: clinical_follow_up_schedule: ["History & physical: Every 3-6 months for 1-2 years, then every 6-12 months until year 3, then annually thereafter [26].", "Annual influenza vaccine and other vaccines as clinically indicated (see NCCN Guidelines for Survivorship) [26]."], imaging_strategy: ["Surveillance FDG-PET/CT is not recommended due to high false-positive rate [29].", "Diagnostic CT (contrast-enhanced) may be obtained at 3-6 month intervals for up to 2 years as clinically indicated, or after 2 years if relapse is suspected [26].", "FDG-PET/CT only indicated if evaluating for potential relapse based on symptoms or clinical findings [26]."], laboratory_monitoring: ["CBC, ESR (if elevated at diagnosis), chemistry profile: Annually [26].", "Thyroid function tests (TFTs): At least annually if thyroid was in RT field [26].", "Lipid panel: Biannually for cardiovascular risk assessment [26].", "Fasting glucose: Annually for diabetes screening if abdominal RT [19]."], supportive_follow_up: ["Counseling on reproduction, health habits, cardiovascular risk reduction, breast awareness, skin cancer risk, and end-of-treatment summary [26].", "Consider referral to survivorship clinic and coordination with PCP [26].", "Screen for psychosocial distress using NCCN Distress Thermometer [25]."]

timeline.title: 0–2 years
timeline.body: History & physical every 3–6 months; annual influenza vaccine; diagnostic CT (contrast) may be obtained at 3–6 month intervals as clinically indicated; CBC, ESR, chemistry profile annually; TFTs annually if thyroid in RT field; lipid panel biannually; fasting glucose annually if abdominal RT; counseling on reproduction, health habits, cardiovascular risk reduction, breast awareness, skin cancer risk, end-of-treatment summary; consider referral to survivorship clinic; screen for psychosocial distress.

timeline.title: 2–3 years
timeline.body: History & physical every 6–12 months; annual influenza vaccine; diagnostic CT only if relapse suspected (after 2 years); CBC, ESR, chemistry profile annually; TFTs annually if thyroid in RT field; lipid panel biannually; fasting glucose annually if abdominal RT; continued counseling, survivorship clinic consideration, distress screening.

timeline.title: >3 years
timeline.body: History & physical annually; annual influenza vaccine; FDG-PET/CT only if evaluating potential relapse based on symptoms or clinical findings; CBC, ESR, chemistry profile annually; TFTs annually if thyroid in RT field; lipid panel biannually; fasting glucose annually if abdominal RT; ongoing counseling, survivorship clinic referral, distress screening.
